description: List entries with filtering and cursor-based pagination. For inventory and exploration, not semantic search. Defaults to cwd_inferred when scope is omitted. Returns metadata + snippet (two-phase retrieval). Filters combine with AND semantics. Results ordered by updated_at DESC.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous cx_browse response. Pass next_cursor to fetch the next page.

include_resolution.description: Include scope resolution metadata in the response. Defaults to true when scope="cwd_inferred".

include_superseded.description: Include superseded (inactive) entries in results. Default: false.

limit.description: Maximum entries per page. Default: 20, max: 200.

scope.description: Scope filter for browse. Send a JSON object {kind, ...} where kind is one of: 'path' (with 'path'), 'subtree' (with 'path', matches scope and descendants), 'set' (with 'paths'), 'all' (no extras), 'cwd_inferred' (optional 'cwd'), 'project'/'repo'/'session' (with matching identifier fields). See the schema's examples field. Defaults to {kind: 'cwd_inferred'} when omitted.

cwd.description: Filesystem path used for scope inference. Optional for kind 'cwd_inferred'.

path.description: Canonical scope path beginning with 'global'. Required for kind 'path'; required for kind 'subtree' on broad shapes.

paths.description: List of canonical scope paths. Required for kind 'set'.

project.description: Project identifier. Required for kind 'project', 'repo', and 'session'.

repo.description: Repo identifier. Required for kind 'repo'. Optional for kind 'session'.

tag.description: Filter by tag. Entries must have at least one matching tag.

name: cx_browse

outputSchema.description: Browse response: filtered inventory header, optional advisory, optional scope resolution metadata, rows, and pagination tail.

advisory.description: Capability advisory emitted when browse applied a default.

entries.description: Browse rows on this page. Order is significant (sort_used governs).

kind.description: Entry kind. Omitted when the header hoists a uniform kind.

scope.description: Row scope path. Omitted when the header hoists a uniform scope.

snippet.description: Smart snippet of the entry body.

has_more.description: True when another page is available via `next_cursor`.

header.description: Per-response result header with hoisted uniform columns and histograms.

created_by.description: Uniform creator attribution hoisted from all returned rows. Omitted when rows vary or the response is empty.

kind.description: Uniform entry kind hoisted from all returned rows. Omitted when rows vary or the response is empty.

kinds_histogram.description: Per-kind counts across the returned rows.

returned.description: Number of rows in `entries` on this page.

scope.description: Uniform scope path hoisted from all returned rows. Omitted when rows vary or the response is empty.

sort_used.description: Sort order the browse pipeline applied (e.g. updated_at desc).

tags_histogram.description: Per-tag counts across the returned rows.

total.description: Total matching rows in the store before pagination.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor to feed back as `cursor` on the next page. Omitted when `has_more` is false.

resolution.description: Scope resolution metadata when smart browse inference was requested.

candidates.description: Candidate scopes considered by the resolver, sorted best first.

matched.description: Signals that contributed to this candidate score.

confidence.description: Resolver confidence in the selected scope.

requested_scope.description: Scope input supplied by the caller, usually cwd_inferred.

resolved_scope.description: Existing exact scope path used for the browse query.

signals.description: Human-readable explanation of the selected scope.
